name: 玩仔的冒险
short_description: Choose your skills, combine your equipment, match them with unexpected combinations and enjoy the joy of mowing grass. playgus is a survival-like game. Players will be free to take risks in a relaxed and pleasant style.
detailed_description:
Choose your own skills, synthesize your equipment, match all kinds of unexpected combinations and enjoy mowing the grass. Start your pleasant adventure here!

First, choose your character to start an adventure, and buy items at the beginning of each adventure. The items in the store can also be synthesized into advanced items. In the process of adventure, the character will upgrade the level, and with the upgrade of the level, the character will finally select four skills to improve the combat ability. Monsters will get stronger and stronger with the number of waves. In this process, you need to selectively improve your ability to complete all the adventures.

Game features：

Automatic combat, you just need to be responsible for the flexible position.

Choose your own skills, and choose four combinations from more than 80 skills to form your role skills.

Equipment synthesis, more than 100 kinds of equipment provide you with rich construction routes.

There are more than 20 roles for you to choose from.

Dynamic difficulty, you can choose a difficulty option before each wave starts.
